upload.title: Upload Manuscript
upload.description: Upload your existing manuscript and we'll extract the text for you to continue editing.
upload.formats: Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, TXT • Max size: 50MB

quick_create.title: Start from Scratch
quick_create.description: Create a blank book with just a title and genre. Perfect for when you're ready to dive straight into writing.

voice.title: Voice to Text
voice.description: Upload an audio file of your story and we'll transcribe it into text using AI. Supports English, Hebrew, and many other languages.
voice.formats_list: MP3, WAV, M4A, MP4, MPEG, MPGA, WEBM

messages.export_no_chapters: Cannot export a book without chapters. Please add content to your book first.
messages.export_no_content: Cannot export a book without content. Please add some text to your chapters first.
messages.invalid_file_type: Please upload a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file
messages.file_too_large: File size must be less than 50MB
messages.invalid_audio_type: Please upload a valid audio file (MP3, WAV, M4A)
messages.audio_too_large: Audio file size must be less than 25MB

hero.title: Unleash Your Inner Author
hero.subtitle: Write, design, and publish professional books with AI assistance. Join thousands of authors earning from their stories on the world's most magical publishing platform.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: From your first word to your first sale, MeStory provides professional-grade tools that make book publishing accessible to everyone.

ai_copilot.title: AI Co-Pilot
ai_copilot.description: Never face writer's block again. Our Gemini-powered AI assists you with plot development, character creation, and real-time writing suggestions.

cover_studio.title: 3D Cover Studio
cover_studio.description: Transform your manuscript into a professional book with AI-generated covers, customizable layouts, and print-ready export capabilities.

marketplace.title: Global Marketplace
marketplace.description: Publish and sell your books to readers worldwide. Set your own price, earn 50% revenue share, and build your author brand with our social features.

community.title: Join a Thriving Community
community.subtitle: Writers from around the world are already creating, publishing, and earning with MeStory.

cta.title: Ready to Write Your Story?
cta.subtitle: Start writing today with 100 free AI credits. No credit card required.

footer.description: The world's most magical AI-powered book writing and publishing platform. Democratizing storytelling for everyone.
footer.copyright: © 2026 MeStory. All rights reserved. Powered by Google Gemini 2.5 Flash.
